title: View Google Doc Links (added to file column) in File Gallery View
excerpt:
Hi.  I can add google doc links to a file-type column (cool).  But I’d love to see these in the File Gallery view.  I have hundreds of these links since we collaborate on content using google workspace products. 
Is ther…

posts.author: psenatori (Paul Senatori)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I can add google doc links to a file-type column (cool). But I’d love to see these in the File Gallery view. I have hundreds of these links since we collaborate on content using google workspace products.

Is there a way to see these files in the Files Gallery view? Converting them to Word/PDF is not an option since I would lose the collaboration, and also make my life miserable.

Thanks
Paul

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Paul!

Unfortunately, the Google docs won’t show up in the File Gallery view because this isn’t supported just yet in our platform. Our apologies for the inconvenience this causes!

Perhaps using the Files View in the Updates Section could be a useful workaround? What do you think?
